mapper.select:
select fa.id, fa.user_id, fa.asset_name, fa.asset_category, fa.purchase_price, fa.purchase_date, fa.current_value, fa.depreciation_rate, fa.remark,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages
from fixed_assets fa left join user_info ui on (ui.id = fa.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND fa.asset_nam LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.assetName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
order by fa.id desc
